description: A plain candid news/event photograph with no graphic-design treatment or on-image text. It shows President Donald Trump standing outdoors at an active construction site on a sunny day, wearing a dark suit and red tie, presenting/holding one of several large architectural rendering boards mounted on tripod easels. The renderings depict a grand neoclassical columned building (the planned White House Ballroom). Behind him is an excavated construction pit with rebar, concrete forms, scaffolding, yellow safety barriers and construction materials; a large classical stone government building (the Treasury Building) and trees with blue sky are visible in the background. This is documentary photojournalism of a presidential press appearance rather than a designed meme or poster. Per the tweet, Trump is giving the press a look at the White House Ballroom construction project.
